elements.original_description: A tiny green sprout emerging from soil, with a soft glow around it. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a tiny green sprout emerging from rich, dark soil, with a soft, gentle glow emanating from its tip. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background. High contrast, no shading, no gradients, no textures. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. Consistent and subtle mood, isolated subject.

elements.original_description: A large, flourishing tree with bright green leaves and vibrant roots. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a large, flourishing tree with a full canopy of bright green leaves and a network of vibrant, detailed roots visible below. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background. High contrast, no shading, no gradients, no textures. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. Strong, impactful result, isolated subject.
